title: helcia brevis
intro: Helcia brevis, also known as the Mexican Heliconia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Heliconiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helcia brevis include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating skin irritations, as well as supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Helcia brevis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
